ai_runner perf baseline
host                 : <unknown>
samples              : 10000
median_us_per_step   : 0.583
min_us               : 0.333
max_us               : 35.709
projected_monza_hours: 0.0035  (0.21 minutes; = median * 36000 steps/lap * 24 children * 200 generations / (8 cores * 1e6 us/s * 3600 s/h))
assessment           : projection < 4h -> no mitigation needed (Step 4.0 skipped)
